name: New Potato Salad (Satterly)
recipeIngredient: 1 small Bell pepper, red or green
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium pot, cook cubed potatoes in salted water until tender.
2. Meanwhile, combine the remaining ingredients (dried dill, dried rosemary, olive oil, malt vinegar, and onions) in a small bowl.
3. Drain the cooked potatoes, add them to the bowl with the other ingredients, and toss gently.
4. Serve warm or at room temperature, or cold.
